title: BMSProxyCore
description: The only Velocity Core anyone will ever need!
body:
# 🌟 BMSProxyCore - The Ultimate Velocity Proxy Plugin

  A comprehensive, modular Velocity proxy plugin designed for modern Minecraft networks. BMSProxyCore provides essential communication tools, server management features, and extensive customization options.

  ## ✨ Key Features

  ### 📢 Staff Chat System
  - **Cross-Server Communication**: Staff can communicate across all connected servers
  - **Discord Integration**: Send staff messages to Discord with player avatars using webhooks
  - **Activity Tracking**: Monitor staff joins, leaves, and server switches
  - **Toggle Mode**: Staff can switch between public and staff chat seamlessly
  - **Console Support**: Console can send and receive staff messages

  ### 💬 Advanced Private Messaging
  - **Cross-Server Messaging**: Send private messages between players on different servers
  - **Reply System**: Quick reply to the last received message
  - **Social Spy**: Staff can monitor all private messages for moderation
  - **Message Toggle**: Players can disable incoming private messages
  - **Ignore System**: Block messages from specific players
  - **Bypass Permissions**: Staff can bypass player restrictions

  ### 🏠 Lobby Command System
  - **Quick Teleportation**: Instant teleport to configured lobby server
  - **Customizable Commands**: Configure main command and multiple aliases
  - **Cooldown System**: Prevent spam with configurable cooldowns
  - **Bypass Permissions**: Configurable Bypass Permissions

  ### 🔧 Modular Architecture
  - **Enable/Disable Modules**: Only use the features you need
  - **Dynamic Reloading**: Change module states without server restart
  - **Separate Configurations**: Each module has its own config file
  - **Conditional Loading**: Modules only load when enabled

  ### 🔒 Advanced Permission System
  - **Granular Control**: Individual permissions for every feature
  - **Customizable Nodes**: Configure all permission names
  - **Role-Based Access**: Different permission levels for different ranks
  - **Bypass Permissions**: Special permissions for staff privileges

  ## 🚀 Easy Setup

  1. Drop the JAR into your Velocity plugins folder
  2. Restart your proxy
  3. Configure modules in the generated config files
  4. Set up Discord webhooks (optional)
  5. Assign permissions to your staff

  ## 🔧 Highly Configurable

  Every aspect is customizable:
  - Message formats and colors
  - Permission nodes and requirements
  - Command names and aliases
  - Cooldowns and restrictions
  - Discord integration settings

  ## 📋 Commands Overview

  **Staff Chat**: `/staffchat`, `/staffchattoggle`
  **Private Messages**: `/msg`, `/reply`, `/socialspy`, `/msgtoggle`, `/ignore`
  **Lobby Commands**: `/lobby`, `/hub`, `/spawn` (customizable)
  **Administration**: `/bmsproxycore reload/status/modules`

  ## 🔑 Permission Examples

  ```
  # Staff permissions
  bmsproxycore.staffchat.use
  bmsproxycore.staffchat.activity
  
  # Player permissions
  bmsproxycore.message.send
  bmsproxycore.lobby.use
  
  # Admin permissions
  bmsproxycore.message.socialspy
  bmsproxycore.admin.reload
  ```

  ## 🌐 Discord Integration

  - Send staff messages to Discord channels
  - Customizable webhook names and formats
  - Activity notifications (joins/leaves/server switches)

  ## 💡 Why Choose BMSProxyCore?

  - **Modular Design**: Use only what you need
  - **Performance Optimized**: Lightweight and efficient
  - **Actively Maintained**: Regular updates and bug fixes
